title: DRW MD-DRW-521: Battery Retention System
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-521 Rev A — Battery Retention System

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1067, P-1068, P-1069, P-1061.
4. Drawn by Tobias Wren, checked by Lena Okafor, approved by Dr. Rhea Voss.
